## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Scope

- Backend
- Frontend
- Docs
- Infra / workflow

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest backend/tests`
- [ ] `python backend/scripts/smoke_test_sprint_1.py`
- [ ] `npm run test` in `frontend/`
- [ ] `npm run build` in `frontend/`
- [ ] Not all checks were relevant to this PR, and I explained which ones were skipped

## UI / Product Notes

- Screenshots or short notes if the UI changed
- Translation impact if new copy was added

## Data / Security Notes

- Migration included when required
- No secrets, uploads, generated bulletins, or local-only files are part of this PR

## Reviewer Notes

- Areas where you want extra attention
- Follow-up work that is intentionally out of scope
